residential_design.pain: You have a yard you ignore because it is hard to know where to start.
residential_design.desire: A yard that looks cared for, feels inviting, and adds real value to your home.
residential_design.objection: I don't know if I can afford it or if it will be worth the disruption.

lawn_maintenance.pain: Keeping up with lawn care takes time you don't have.
lawn_maintenance.desire: A consistently green, clean yard without lifting a finger.
lawn_maintenance.objection: I've had unreliable services that skip visits or don't show up.

hardscaping.pain: My outdoor space isn't usable — no patio, no structure.
hardscaping.desire: A patio, walkway, or outdoor kitchen that extends my living space.
hardscaping.objection: Construction seems expensive and the result might not match the vision.

cta_style: low-friction: 'Get a Free Estimate' not 'Buy Now'
faq_tone: plain answers to real questions about cost, timing, and credentials
